title: Chipped Cutting Recipes
description: This mod adds cutting recipes for Chipped blocks. Both create saw and vanilla stone cutter recipes are added.
body:
This mod adds new stonecutter recipes to Minecraft using only json recipes — no code, no performance overhead.

✅ Works with Fabric Loader only
✅ No Fabric API required
✅ Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.16 and above
✅ Safe to use on servers

Designed for maximum compatibility across multiple versions, this mod is ideal for players or modpack creators who want to enhance the stonecutting experience without modifying any core mechanics.

📁 All recipes are defined in simple JSON files.
🔧 No mixins, no custom code — just clean, minimal data-driven design.
